case_title: ANNA T. WONG VS. CAROLINA ORTIZ et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WONG, ANNA T. AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, CAROLINA URBINE, CATIUSKA LOPEZ, DIEGO CARRERA, JUAN F. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGEMENT ENTERED ON DECEMBER 13, 2007.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED NOV-09-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, CAROLINA URBINE, CATIUSKA LOPEZ, DIEGO CARRERA, JUAN F. TAMBRIZ, LORENZO MARTINEZ, MARGARITA ORTIZ, JOSE LUIS MORATAYA, EDGAR GARCIA, CARMEN C. RODRIGUEZ, BERTA L. RIVERA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, ANNA T. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, CAROLINA URBINE, CATIUSKA LOPEZ, DIEGO CARRERA, JUAN F.
